frequencies.title: Frequency-Based Pricing
frequencies.linkedNote: Monthly and 2x Per Month are linked. Changing one will update the other.
frequencies.saniscrubTip: Tip: In SaniScrub, monthly and 2x monthly typically share the same rate per fixture and minimum. The linked values ensure consistency.
frequencies.refreshTip: Tip: Monthly multipliers convert per-visit costs to monthly costs. Annual multipliers convert to yearly costs. For example, weekly service has a 4.33 monthly multiplier (4.33 weeks per month average).
frequencies.empty: No frequency configuration for this service

minimums.title: Minimum Charges
minimums.fixtureThresholdHint: Facilities with ≤ this many fixtures get minimum charge
minimums.empty: No minimum configuration for this service

multipliers.refreshNote: These multipliers convert per-visit costs to monthly and annual billing amounts. They are used throughout the Refresh Power Scrub calculation engine.
multipliers.title: Multipliers
multipliers.empty: No multiplier configuration for this service

addons.title: Add-On Services
addons.sqFtUnitHint: Charge per this many square feet
addons.empty: No add-on configuration for this service

refreshPowerScrub.title: Core Rates & Area-Specific Pricing
refreshPowerScrub.defaultHourlyRateHint: Base rate per hour per worker ($200)
refreshPowerScrub.perWorkerRateHint: Rate per worker when pricing per worker ($200)
refreshPowerScrub.perHourRateHint: Rate per hour when pricing per hour ($400)
refreshPowerScrub.fixedFeeHint: Base fixed fee for square footage pricing ($200)
refreshPowerScrub.insideRateHint: Rate per square foot inside ($0.60/sq ft)
refreshPowerScrub.outsideRateHint: Rate per square foot outside ($0.40/sq ft)
refreshPowerScrub.ruleAreasValue: Dumpster, Patio, Walkway, Front of House, Back of House, Other
refreshPowerScrub.rulePricingTypesValue: Preset packages, Per worker, Per hour, Square footage, Custom

advanced.title: Advanced JSON Editor
advanced.warning: Warning: Editing JSON directly can break the pricing calculator. Use the structured tabs above when possible.

janitorial.productionRatesDescription: Sets how many square feet one worker cleans per hour for each place type. Hours Per Visit = Square Feet ÷ Production Rate.
janitorial.laborDefaultsDescription: These are the admin-configured baseline values. Salespeople can override them per quote.
janitorial.defaultGrossProfit: Default: 33% — Contract Value = Total Cost ÷ (1 − Gross Profit%)
janitorial.supplyDefaultsDescription: These are the default annual supply costs pre-filled when creating a new quote. Salespeople can edit them per quote.

detailedView.title: {{label}} - Pricing Details
detailedView.newPlaceTypeDescription: Enter a name and production rate
detailedView.emptyCategory: No fields available in this category
detailedView.priceUpdateFailed: Failed to update price. Please try again.
detailedView.placeTypeAddFailed: Failed to add place type. Please try again.

detailedFields.smallWindowPriceDesc: Price for cleaning small windows (both sides included, typically $1.50)
detailedFields.mediumWindowPriceDesc: Price for cleaning medium windows (both sides included, typically $3.00)
detailedFields.largeWindowPriceDesc: Price for cleaning large windows (both sides included, typically $7.00)
detailedFields.installationMultiplierDesc: Multiply base price by this for first-time/dirty installations (typically 3x)
detailedFields.standardTripChargeDesc: Standard trip charge for service visits (typically $0)
detailedFields.quarterlyPriceMultiplierAfterFirstTimeDe: Multiplier for quarterly service after initial clean (typically 2x)
detailedFields.weeklyMonthlyRecurringDesc: Multiply weekly rate to get monthly billing (typically 4.33)
detailedFields.weeklyMonthlyRecurring433Desc: Multiply weekly rate to get monthly billing (typically 4.33 = 52/12)
detailedFields.weeklyMonthlyRecurringByThisDesc: Multiply weekly rate by this to get monthly billing (typically 4.33)
detailedFields.biweeklyMonthlyRecurringDesc: Multiply biweekly rate to get monthly billing (typically 2.165)
detailedFields.biweeklyMonthlyRecurring2165Desc: Multiply biweekly rate to get monthly billing (typically 2.165 = 26/12)
detailedFields.baseSqFtUnitDesc: Base square footage unit for pricing (typically 500 sq ft)
detailedFields.basePriceDesc: Price for the base square footage unit
detailedFields.additionalSqFtUnitDesc: Additional square footage unit for pricing
detailedFields.additionalUnitPriceDesc: Price for each additional unit beyond the base
detailedFields.carpetMinimumChargePerVisitDesc: Minimum charge per service visit regardless of area
detailedFields.dirtyInstallMultiplierDesc: Multiply rate by this for dirty/heavily soiled carpets (typically 3x)
detailedFields.cleanInstallMultiplierDesc: Multiply rate by this for clean/lightly soiled carpets (typically 1x)
detailedFields.sprayRatePerRoomDesc: Rate per room when pricing by room count (typically $20)
detailedFields.spraySqFtUnitDesc: Square footage unit for pricing (typically 1000 sq ft)
detailedFields.standardDrainRateDesc: Base rate per drain for standard foaming treatment
detailedFields.alternateExtraPerDrainDesc: Alternative pricing model - additional charge per drain
detailedFields.minimumDrainsDesc: Minimum number of drains required to qualify for volume pricing
detailedFields.weeklyRatePerDrainVolumeDesc: Discounted rate per drain for weekly service with volume pricing
detailedFields.bimonthlyRatePerDrainDesc: Discounted rate per drain for bimonthly service with volume pricing
detailedFields.weeklyRatePerTrapDesc: Weekly service rate for grease trap treatment
detailedFields.installPerTrapDesc: One-time installation charge for grease trap service
detailedFields.installPerDrainDesc: One-time installation charge for green drain service
detailedFields.greenWeeklyRatePerDrainDesc: Weekly service rate for eco-friendly green drain treatment
detailedFields.plumbingWeeklyAddonPerDrainDesc: Additional weekly charge per drain for plumbing addon service
detailedFields.filthyMultiplierDesc: Multiply rate by this for heavily clogged/filthy drains (typically 3x)
detailedFields.flatPricePerBathroomDesc: Base rate per bathroom included with SaniClean service
detailedFields.hugeBathroomSqFtUnitDesc: Square footage threshold for huge bathrooms (typically 300 sq ft)

detailedFields.flatPriceSingleLargeAreaDesc: Flat rate for a single large extra area (e.g., lobby, hallway)
detailedFields.extraAreaSqFtUnitDesc: Square footage unit for extra areas pricing (typically 400 sq ft)
detailedFields.ratePerSqFtUnitDesc: Rate per square footage unit for extra areas
detailedFields.useHigherRateDesc: Use the higher of flat rate or per-unit calculation
detailedFields.standaloneSqFtUnitDesc: Square footage unit for standalone pricing (typically 200 sq ft)
detailedFields.standaloneRatePerSqFtUnitDesc: Rate per unit when purchased as a standalone service
detailedFields.standaloneMinimumPriceDesc: Minimum charge for standalone microfiber mopping service
detailedFields.includeTripChargeDesc: Whether to include trip charge in standalone pricing
detailedFields.costPerLaborHourDesc: Admin-configured baseline labor cost per hour. Salespeople can override per quote. Default: $20
detailedFields.laborTaxPctDesc: Percentage added on top of base labor to cover payroll taxes and benefits. Default: 15%
detailedFields.grossProfitPctDesc: Target gross profit margin. Contract Value = Total Cost ÷ (1 − Gross Profit%). Default: 33%
detailedFields.supplyVacuumsDesc: Default annual cost for vacuum equipment. Default: $100
detailedFields.supplyMopsDesc: Default annual cost for mops. Default: $500
detailedFields.supplyMopBucketsDesc: Default annual cost for mop buckets. Default: $200
detailedFields.supplyDustMopsDesc: Default annual cost for dust mops. Default: $300
detailedFields.supplyMicrofiberDesc: Default annual cost for microfiber cloths. Default: $0
detailedFields.supplyCleaningProductsDesc: Default annual cost for cleaning products. Default: $0
detailedFields.supplyConsumablesDesc: Default annual cost for consumables. Default: $0
detailedFields.supplyMiscellaneousDesc: Default annual cost for miscellaneous supplies. Default: $0
detailedFields.insidePricePerFixtureDesc: Standard a la carte rate per fixture for inside beltway locations (typically $7)
detailedFields.insideMinimumPriceDesc: Minimum charge for inside beltway locations (typically $40)
detailedFields.insideTripChargeDesc: Trip charge for inside beltway locations (typically $8)
detailedFields.parkingFeeAddOnDesc: Additional parking fee for paid parking locations (typically $15)
detailedFields.outsidePricePerFixtureDesc: Standard a la carte rate per fixture for outside beltway locations (typically $6)

detailedFields.minimumFixturesThresholdDesc: Maximum fixtures to qualify as small facility (typically 6)
detailedFields.minimumPriceUnderThresholdDesc: Minimum charge for small facilities under threshold (typically $48)
detailedFields.standardToLuxuryPerDispenserPerWeek: Standard to Luxury Per Dispenser Per Week

detailedFields.excessStandardSoapPerGallonDesc: Charge for excessive standard soap usage per gallon (typically $45)
detailedFields.excessLuxurySoapPerGallonDesc: Charge for excessive luxury soap usage per gallon (typically $75)
detailedFields.airFreshenerDispenserWarrantyFeePerWeek: Air Freshener Dispenser Warranty Fee Per Week
detailedFields.airFreshenerDispenserWarrantyFeePerWeekD: Weekly warranty fee per air freshener dispenser (typically $1.25)
detailedFields.soapDispenserWarrantyFeePerWeek: Soap Dispenser Warranty Fee Per Week

detailedFields.toiletSeatCoverDispenserMonthlyPrice: Toilet Seat Cover Dispenser Monthly Price

detailedFields.standaloneAlternatePricePerUnitPerWeekB: Standalone - Alternate Price Per Unit Per Week (Option B)

detailedFields.sanipodWeeklyMonthlyRecurringDesc: Multiply weekly rate to get monthly billing (typically 4.33 = 52/12)
detailedFields.sanipodBiweeklyMonthlyRecurringDesc: Multiply biweekly rate to get monthly billing (typically 2.165 = 26/12)

detailedFields.perHourRateDesc: Rate per hour when pricing per hour (typically $400)
